generated_oml:
instance SysMLEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "SysML for structural modeling"
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionModelIdentificationService
]

instance SimulinkEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MathWorks Simulink for simulation"
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionModelIdentificationService, DashboardVisualizationService
]

instance MQTTEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MQTT protocol for data streaming"
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionModelIdentificationService, DashboardVisualizationService
]

instance AASEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Asset Administration Shells (AAS) for digital twin integration"
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionModelIdentificationService, DashboardVisualizationService
]

instance DashboardEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Dashboard visualization tools for data representation"
    DTDFVocab:enables DashboardVisualizationService
]

instance MotorPositionEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Position encoder mounted on motor for angular position measurement"
    DTDFVocab:producedData MotorPositionData
]

instance GearboxPositionEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Secondary position encoder behind gearbox for angular position measurement"
    DTDFVocab:producedData GearboxPositionData
]

instance CurrentSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Current sensor measuring input current to motor"
    DTDFVocab:producedData CurrentData
]

instance MotorPositionData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorPositionEncoder
]

instance GearboxPositionData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom GearboxPositionEncoder
]

instance CurrentData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom CurrentSensor
]

instance TorqueData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom CurrentSensor, MotorPositionEncoder
]

instance AngularVelocityData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorPositionEncoder
]

instance SimulatedOutputsDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SimulinkModel
]

instance MeasuredMotorPositionData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Measured motor-mounted angular position data trace"
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorPositionData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler
]

instance MeasuredGearboxPositionData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Measured gearbox-position angular position data trace"
    DTDFVocab:fromData GearboxPositionData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler
]

instance MeasuredCurrentData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Measured input current data trace"
    DTDFVocab:fromData CurrentData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler
]

instance MeasuredTorqueData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Measured torque data trace"
    DTDFVocab:fromData TorqueData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler
]

instance MeasuredAngularVelocityData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Measured angular velocity data trace"
    DTDFVocab:fromData AngularVelocityData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler
]

instance SimulatedOutputsData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Simulated output data from friction models"
    DTDFVocab:fromData SimulatedOutputsDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DashboardEnabler
]

instance SysMLStructuralModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "SysML structural model with Block and Internal Block Diagrams for system architecture"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SysMLEnabler
]

instance CoulombViscousModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Coulomb-Viscous friction model for simulation"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler
]

instance StribeckModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Stribeck friction model for simulation"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler
]

instance DahlModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Dahl friction model for simulation"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler
]

instance LuGreModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "LuGre friction model for simulation"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler
]

instance AASModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Asset Administration Shell for digital twin integration"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo AASEnabler
]

instance SimulinkModel : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Simulink-based simulation model for friction analysis"
]

instance Sinumerik840DController : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Siemens SINUMERIK 840D sl CNC controller for position, speed, or acceleration inputs"
]

instance PermanentMagnetSynchronousMotor : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Permanent magnet synchronous motor for rotational motion actuation"
]

instance Gearwheel : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Gearwheel component in the robot axis"
]

instance CycloidalGearbox : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Cycloidal gearbox component in the robot axis"
]

instance MABIMAX100Axis1 : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "First axis of MABI MAX 100 industrial robot for motion control and friction analysis"
    base:contains PermanentMagnetSynchronousMotor, Gearwheel, CycloidalGearbox, Sinumerik840DController
]

instance FrictionModelIdentificationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time friction model identification using white-box and black-box models"
    DTDFVocab:provides FrictionParametersInsight
]

instance DashboardVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Integrated dashboard visualization of simulated versus measured data"
    DTDFVocab:provides DeviationsVisualizationInsight
]

instance MotionAccuracyEnhancementService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Motion accuracy enhancement through continuous model refinement"
    DTDFVocab:provides MotionAccuracyAction
]

instance FrictionParametersInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Friction parameters identification for control system adjustment"
]

instance DeviationsVisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Visualized deviations between simulated and measured data to inform motion accuracy improvements"
]

instance MotionAccuracyAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Motion accuracy enhancement through continuous model refinement"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "No interaction; digital shadow functions as a passive entity with one-way data flow from physical to virtual."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "Integration of sensor data via MQTT, processing through Simulink models, SysML structural models, AAS for asset description, and unified dashboard visualization for real-time friction analysis."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "As operated phase, continuously updated with live operational data to account for wear, tool changes, and application variations."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "MQTT protocol for streaming sensor data from physical robot to digital shadow."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "Asset Administration Shell (AAS) standards for asset description and SysML for system modeling."
]
